notes: Solid Tetris implementation with hold, ghost piece, DAS, SRS-lite rotation, and line clear animation; minor issue with lock timer double-counting in gravity loop and I-piece rotation symmetry reduces to 2 states instead of proper 4, but overall very playable.
Excellent implementation with full mechanics including 7-bag, ghost piece, hold, and DAS, though mini-pieces in the UI are slightly misaligned.

A solid and mostly complete Tetris build, but rotation is only SRS-lite, line clear animation briefly hides the active piece, and there are enough rules/UX inaccuracies to keep it well below top-tier.
